overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt holding a torch and exploring a dark medieval village at night. The character stands initially as an NPC walks around him, then proceeds to walk through cobblestone streets lined with wooden buildings under a stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square outside wooden farmhouse

events.description: woman in blue dress walks around the character from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing still holding a lit torch while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman in simple dress walking a circular path around the character

entered.detail: large dark wooden building with porch and sloped roof
low stone foundation wall running along the left side
bush with bright yellow autumn leaves catching the torchlight
dark evergreen tree rising behind the farmhouse
tall dark stone tower visible in the background against the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark medieval village square at night. The character stands before a large wooden farmhouse holding a torch, while a woman in a blue dress walks around him. A yellow autumn bush glows in the torchlight to the right, and a tall pine tree rises behind the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street through medieval village center

events.description: character begins walking forward down the cobblestone street
character makes a slight left turn while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street holding a torch to light the way

entered.detail: uneven cobblestone road surface illuminated by torchlight
small wooden house with steep roof appearing as the character walks forward
gothic spires of a distant church visible against the stormy sky
wooden wagon or cart parked beside the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking down a cobblestone street through the medieval village, leaving the farmhouse behind. The torch illuminates the uneven stones underfoot as wooden buildings line both sides of the street. Gothic spires are visible in the distance against the stormy night sky, and the character makes a slight left turn as they proceed deeper into the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a static position in a dark village square into a journey down a narrow, torch-lit street. It begins with the character standing before a large wooden farmhouse, where a woman in a blue dress passes by and a yellow autumn bush glows in the torchlight. As the character starts to move, the camera follows him away from the farmhouse and the towering pine tree, shifting focus to the uneven cobblestones underfoot. The scene then expands to reveal a corridor of wooden buildings lining the path, with distant Gothic spires emerging against a stormy night sky. Finally, the camera tracks the character as he makes a slight left turn, proceeding deeper into the atmospheric medieval village.
